blue_hour.title: Blue Hour Sweep
blue_hour.summary: The Recovery Bureau is preparing a city-wide signal sweep timed to a courier blackout window known as Blue Hour.
blue_hour.stakes: If it lands clean, half the shard's ghost routes and dead drops go live in Bureau custody.
stages: Quiet Bureau sampling around the switchyard and relay roofs.
Ghost routes start going dark in isolated pockets.
The district realizes Blue Hour is not rumor anymore.
The sweep is live and every friendly blind spot is up for auction.

worldEffects.label: Relay roof scans cycling on the Blue Hour grid

ghost_ledger.title: Ghost Ledger
ghost_ledger.summary: An erased shipping ledger ties Clinic Circle losses, courier routes, and archive blackmail to a single hidden buyer.
ghost_ledger.stakes: Whoever owns the ledger can trade debts, medical leverage, and route access like ammunition.
stages: Fragments of the ledger surface as rumor and half-deleted timestamps.
Names connected to the ledger start disappearing from public systems.
Every faction decides the ledger matters more than whatever they said yesterday.
The buyer behind the ledger starts forcing the district to pick sides.

marrow_debt.title: Marrow Debt
marrow_debt.summary: Dr. Ilex's patients are being quietly turned into obligations the Clinic Circle can call in later.
marrow_debt.stakes: The wrong surgery can become indenture, and half the district owes blood they cannot repay.
stages: Clinic debt whispers stay behind curtains and lowered voices.
Patients start vanishing into favors they never remember agreeing to.
Mercy-9 begins keeping names and dates in secret.
The clinic debt machine is visible enough that someone will try to burn it down.

worldEffects.label: Clinic stock costs spike under Marrow Debt

choir_channel.title: Choir Channel
choir_channel.summary: A pirate signal looping confessions of district fixers, stitched from intercepted comms, has started broadcasting into private booths and shrine speakers.
choir_channel.stakes: Whoever controls the channel can ruin a fixer in a single overnight cycle and is teaching the shard to listen for confessions instead of receipts.
stages: Booth speakers in the club catch a stranger's voice for two seconds and nobody admits hearing it.
The channel surfaces a known fixer's private words in public rumor; reputations begin to bleed.
Three factions claim the channel is theirs and one of them is lying badly.
The choir hits broadcast schedule and the city begins confessing back.

fragments: a stranger's voice ghosts through booth seven for two seconds: "...he never paid for the route..."
the bass dips; somebody else's confession bleeds in and the bartender pretends the cable is loose
a name you don't know flickers on the choir feed and three regulars set their drinks down
the booth speakers stutter; for a heartbeat you hear yourself from earlier tonight
worldEffects.label: Choir Channel bleed in club booths

fragments: the candle nearest the relay-spill is guttering on a frequency, not a draft
Widow Byte mouths a name nobody on the wall has spoken in two years
one of the access cards above the shelf is warm to the touch when no current should reach it
worldEffects.label: Choir Channel reaches the shrine wall
